creator: mark@fralnet.com
text:
There is a segfault with zabbix2-agent version 2.0.2 (version 2.0.1 was never
in ports, version 2.0.0 was purportedly unaffected).

  The problem has been addressed on the Zabbix support forum and is reported as
  fixed in their development branch. All neccesary info can be found at
  https://support.zabbix.com/browse/ZBX-5473.

Fix: 

Hopefully the reported patch that is in the zabbix2 SVN repository (and in
  the nightly build) can be backported to 2.0.2.
How-To-Repeat: 	Run zabbix2-agent -p. It will segfault.
